violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The dishwashing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
Inspector observed an air break at the food prep sink and ice machine where an air gap is needed at both. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replenished soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The dishwashing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, food chopper, and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized can opener and chopper. PIC took deli slicer out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Various items were observed past the 7 day date marking. PIC discarded items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Various items was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC added the dates. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Working containers of dry and liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Various items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC relocated items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Inspector observed staff drying dishes with a cloth rag. Staff rewashed/sanitized dishes. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The ice machine (direct connection) and food prep sink (air break) are lacking an air gap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The door to the toilet rooms were observed propped open. PIC closed doors. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The sink used for food preparation and ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen and back kitchen area) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
3 bay sink is lacking a faucet head to adequately fill all 3 compartments.A spray hose is attached. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

The sink used for food preparation and ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
